summary: Background tab and focus-loss improvements for live chart reliability.
release_notes: Charts and WebSocket tick processing now stay responsive when the app window is unfocused or backgrounded: disabled WebView2 background timer throttling and renderer backgrounding on Windows.
Added visibility hooks so queued tick data drains immediately when the app is foregrounded, preventing stale candles after switching away and back.
Suppressed UI health-check false-alarms while the app is hidden so background-tab state no longer triggers spurious reconnect attempts.

Fixed depth subscription sync to avoid cancelling already-loaded chart conids mid-symbol-switch, resolving cases where a loaded ticker's Level 2 depth was dropped when the terminal switched to a new symbol.
